concerns.text: FR-009 requires 'experimental validation of the top 3 predicted sustainable candidates'. The plan (Section 3.4) describes screening virtual candidates and comparing them to *existing* experimental benchmarks, but contains no task, phase, or contract to perform the *new* experimental validation (synthesis and testing) of the top 3 bio-candidates. This is a silent under-planning of a mandatory functional requirement.

SC-005 requires measuring missing critical variables to trigger a clarification flag if >5% of records are affected. The plan (Section 3.1) describes halting if >20% are missing, but lacks a specific task or output artifact to measure and report the <20% but >5% threshold to trigger the 'clarification flag' defined in the success criterion. The plan only addresses the 'halt' condition.
